case_title: MEHER PATEL VS. RED POGI et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, MEHER AS TO DEFENDANT POGI, RED DAMEN, JUNE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
